overall.description: A static nighttime scene from a video game showing a campfire burning in a snowy wilderness with a tent nearby. The fire casts a warm orange glow on the surrounding snow while smoke rises into the starry sky, creating an isolated and serene survival atmosphere.

agents.ego_description: stationary observation of the campfire scene from a fixed vantage point

entered.detail: burning fire with rising smoke, casting warm orange light on the snow
dark canvas tent partially illuminated by firelight
dark night sky with visible stars

segments.scene_description: A stationary view of a solitary campfire burning in a snow-covered wilderness at night. The fire illuminates the immediate area with warm orange light while a dark tent stands to the right. Smoke rises steadily from the flames into the starry sky, with no movement or changes occurring throughout the scene.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, atmospheric gaze upon a solitary campfire that anchors a frozen wilderness under a starry night sky. It begins with a focused view of the burning flames, which cast a warm orange glow across the immediate expanse of pristine snow. As the light flickers, the camera captures a dark tent standing silently to the right, emphasizing the isolation of the campsite. The scene remains poised and still, with smoke rising steadily from the fire into the deep void of the cosmos before the shot concludes in this serene state of survival.
